title: cyclophorus angustatus
intro: Cyclophorus angustatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyclophoridae, commonly known as the "Narrow-lipped Cyclophorus". It is a type of orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Cyclophorus angustatus contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tincture, decoction, or powder for its herbal preparations, which are believed to offer health benefits such as immune system support and pain relief.
